_doc: Rotation certificate: a perfect pairing P of the 12 coordinates. scripts/verify_rotation.py applies the blockwise 45-degree rotation T_P (exact over Q(sqrt2), realized as the integer map h_i = g_i - g_j, h_j = g_i + g_j on each pair (i,j), which is sqrt(2) * T_P) to every witness line and proves the image lies in the integer A-union-W4 world and that all Grams are preserved exactly. Only the pairing is stored; the image composition is recomputed, never echoed.
